publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-25 18:11:39 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, printed material and organizational records.
did.abstract: Letters and other papers relating to the Council.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Letters and other papers from the files of Edgar Heermance, Henry W. Hicock, and A.B. Recknagel, officers of the Council (1942-58); papers pertaining to the dissolution of the Council (1958-59); pamphlets and miscellaneous material relating to Council activities and the forest products industry (1942-59); and incomplete runs of WOOD NOTES and THE COUNCIL BULLETIN.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collection: Arthur Bernard Recknagel. Papers, #1891.
Related collection: Empire State Forest Products Association. Records, #1280.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Northeastern Wood Utilization Council. Records, #1964. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Complete set of the minutes of the Northeastern Wood Utilization Council
An incomplete set of duplicate minutes of the Council
Correspondence relating to the Council's activities while A. B. Recknagel was Executive Secretary of the Organization

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed circular of the Council; mimeographed report "Effect of Chemical Girdling on Bark Separation" by E. C. Ehrhart, May 16, 1951; seven printed pamphlets; and a number of reprints from various magazines concerning wood utilization.

did.unittitle: Four Folders containing ancillary material relating to the Council's activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See donor's one page list marked "#10", on file in acc. Folder.

did.unittitle: Summary of Papers, Reports, and Discussions of Third Meeting, Northeastern Wood Preservation Conference

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Held at New Haven, Connecticut, Nov 17-18, 1955

did.unittitle: Two typed copies of report The Objectives of the Northeastern Wood Utilization Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: By Henry I. Baldwin, Jan. 31, 1952

did.unittitle: I.a. Material from the files of Edgar Heermance, Secretary of the Council
Correspondence relating to the Council's activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of Council members, 1942; Minutes of Greenfield meeting, April 9, 1942; Mimeographed manuscript, Production of Wood Gas as a Domestic Fuel, by R. A. Caughey, June 12, 1942; Council's receipts and expenditures, 1942.

did.unittitle: Correspondence relating to the Council's activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes of June 10, 1943; mimeographed release from the National Research Council and Society of American Foresters.

did.unittitle: Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities
Contains correspondence relating to Council activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes of Springfield meeting, Nov. 17, 1950; provisional draft of program, Wood fuel Conference, Philadelphia, May 10, 1951; printed coy of the articles of Association, Northeastern Wood Utilization Council, Inc.; minutes of Council meeting, May 11, 1950; index to Wood Notes nos. 1-9; minutes of council meeting, March 4, 1949; printed circulars of the Council announcing conferences and activities, 1949-1950.

did.unittitle: I.b. Material from the files of Henry W. Hicock, secretary of the Northeastern Wood Utilization Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All folder titles in this sub-series are original.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence relating to the Council's dissolution and financial transactions

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains mimeographed notices and circulars relating to Council activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence and mimeographed notices relating to the Council's participation in the Charcoal Conference

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains mimeographed material relating to Council activities 1947; printed circular Developing The World's Forest Resources; extra copies of Wood Notes Nos. 2,3,5,6,11,24,30,31; three reprints Organized Marketing and Integrated Logging, by Edgar Heermance, 1946; Problems in the Utilization of Wood Waste, by Robert Aries, 1947, Wood Flour Production, by Robert Aries, 1947

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains copies of the minutes of the Council's meetings; copy of Wood Notes, # 4

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence relating to The Northeastern Logger and its financial transactions with the Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence between William C. MacAdam and the Council's secretary Henry Hicock relating to Council activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence between Lockard and Hicock relating to Council activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence between Recknagel and Hicock relating to Council activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains pamphlet Articles of Association and By-laws, and typed statement Amendment to Articles of Association, The Northeastern Wood Utilization Council, Inc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains financial statements concerning the Council's affairs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains mimeographed, typed and reprinted copies of 7 papers by Robert Aries, Technical Director of the Council. Cutlets for Wood Waste, Possibilities of the Wood-Chemical Industries in the Northeast, The Status and Future of "Improved" Woods, Why Cellulose?, New Products of Wood; Marketing research - Partner of Technical Research; Marketing Research

did.unittitle: N. E. Wd. Utiliz. Council - Nov. 20, 1957 & Subsequently

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence relating to the business and financial activities of the Council, 1957-1958

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains inventory statements for the years 1953-1956

did.unittitle: Wood Preservation Conference Nov. 55 and Bulletins #44, 45

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Does not contain material indicated in title, contains instead business correspondence, 1956; correspondence between Recknagel and Prof. Hans Glaser, Munich, Germany, while Glaser was on a FAO mission in Iran, 1957

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two folders contain the unclassified material a-k

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Northeastern Wood Utilization Council

did.unittitle: Report of the Sub-committee on Forest Research

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: New England Council, Committee on Forestry and Forest Industries. Typed copy

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three page list

did.unittitle: Bulletins of the Northeastern Wood Utilization Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: nos. 13 (two copies), 16, 17

did.unittitle: List of Material relating to the Northeastern Wood Utilization Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three page list

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Essay by Edgar Laing Heermance. Carbon Copy

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: number 28. Typed draft

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black folder, containing minutes of the Council's Jan. 26, 1950 meeting

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two pamphlets published by the Council concerning Hardwood Pulping Conference Sept. 14, 1954

did.unittitle: "The Toxicity to Plants of Wood Preservatives and Their Solvents"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Circular 189, published by the Connecticut Agricultural Experiment Station, New Haven

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Monthly Review

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Four pages

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder contains 4 glossy prints of forestry techniques and report on portable pulp-wood chipper, National Container Corporation of Wisconsin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wood Notes nos. 1-39 (except # 15), typed draft of Wood Notes no. 28; special supplement to Wood Notes no. 28, February 1955; special bulletin, June 1956; program of meeting at New Haven, Nov. 17-18, 1955; circular to the Heads of Forest Schools, Forest Products Laboratories and Research Agencies in Wood Utilization advertising Wood Notes, June 25, 1956; Index to Wood Notes nos 1-20

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Nos. 9-45 (excluding nos. 10, 11, 13, 16, 17, 24, and 34 which are missing). Recknagel letter of October 6, 1959 states that only nos. 10, 21, and 24 are missing (??)

did.unittitle: The Use of Sawmill Waste for Pulp in Eastern Canada

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Department of Resources and Development, Canada. Forestry Branch Bulletin no. 108
